name: codegraph_get_callees
description: Finds all functions called by a target function (forward call graph). USE WHEN: understanding function dependencies, tracing execution flow, or analyzing what code a function touches. SIMPLER than traverse_graph for this common use case. Returns callees array with symbol name and node ID. Use depth>1 to trace the full callee chain (what those callees call). Identify target via uri+line or nodeId from symbol_search.

depth.description: Depth of callee chain to traverse (default: 1)

line.description: 0-based line number of the function. Use with uri to identify the function.

nodeId.description: Internal node ID from symbol_search. Alternative to uri+line.

uri.description: File URI (e.g. file:///Users/me/project/src/main.rs). Use with line to identify the function.
